name: Run Agent
description: Runs the agent's transition loop: reads all messages from the inbox, invokes the specified transition operation once with the entire inbox, appends the result to the timeline, and clears the inbox. The agent transitions from sleeping to running and back to sleeping on completion. If 'operation' is omitted, falls back to the agent's config.operation default.

operation.description: Transition operation reference (e.g. 'llmagent:chat'). Optional if set in agent config.

result.description: Result returned by the transition function
